root_cause.text: The function `avcodec_decode_audio4` performs sample skip operations based on `avctx->internal->skip_samples` without verifying if an audio frame was actually decoded, leading to out-of-bounds array accesses on invalid frame data.
root_cause.evidence: The patch mitigates the issue by adding `&& *got_frame_ptr` to the `if (avctx->internal->skip_samples)` conditional check, ensuring skip handling only occurs when a valid frame pointer is present.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The function `avcodec_decode_audio4` performs sample skip operations based on `avctx->internal->skip_samples` without verifying if an audio frame was actually decoded, leading to out-of-bounds array accesses on invalid frame data.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch mitigates the issue by adding `&& *got_frame_ptr` to the `if (avctx->internal->skip_samples)` conditional check, ensuring skip handling only occurs when a valid frame pointer is present.

intent_record.intent_summary: Guard skip_samples logic to ensure it only executes when a frame has been decoded.
intent_record.what: Added a condition to check if a frame was successfully decoded before processing skip_samples.
intent_record.how: Prevents the code from operating on frame data when no frame was actually decoded, avoiding potential errors.

grouping_result.intent: Guard skip_samples logic to ensure it only executes when a frame has been decoded.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly fixes the vulnerability by guarding the skip_samples logic to ensure it only executes when an audio frame has been successfully decoded, directly addressing the root cause.

candidates.rationale: This line begins the sample skip logic without first checking if a frame was actually decoded (e.g., via `*got_frame_ptr`), leading to operations on invalid frame data.
This line accesses `frame->nb_samples` during the skip logic, which is invalid if no frame was decoded.

vuln_statements.explanation: This statement initiates the sample skip logic without verifying if a frame was actually decoded, which leads to out-of-bounds access when frame data is invalid.

bic_trace_step.reason: The commit introduces the skip_samples logic that modifies frame->nb_samples and calls av_samples_copy without checking if a frame was actually decoded (e.g., checking if *got_frame_ptr is true). This matches the root cause of the vulnerability.
